name: Mana Draught
description:
Active: Bottoms Up

Restores %mana_restore% + %mana_restore_pct%%% of the caster's maximum mana over %heal_duration% seconds. If the hero is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

Hold Control to use on an allied hero.

Passive: Fill Up

Cooldown Speed of Mana Draught is increased by %water_acceleration%%% while in water.
lore: A refreshing drink best shared with friends.
